title: shipfast init
description: Run one command. Shipfast detects your stack, creates a Dockerfile if needed, and sets up the deploy pipeline.

title: git push
description: Push to your branch. A preview URL appears in your PR in 90 seconds. Your team can review on the real environment.

title: Merge → Live
description: Merge to main and your app is live globally. Logs and metrics available immediately. Rollback in one click if needed.
